summary: Mounted Fee Feature Testing Complete - Fixed bug where 'mounted' field was missing from StoneResponse model. All 7 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified working on both Jobs and Stones pages.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/stones/{stone_id}/fees with mounted=true adds $50 mounted fee
Backend: PUT /api/stones/{stone_id}/fees with mounted=false removes $50 mounted fee
Backend: Mounted fee only added once per certificate_group (second stone in same group doesn't add fee)
Backend: Both mounted and color_stability_test can be toggled together (+$100)
Backend: API response includes updated total_fee for frontend
Frontend Jobs: Stone detail dialog shows 'Mounted (Jewellery)' toggle in edit mode
Frontend Jobs: Toggling mounted ON increases stone fee by $50
Frontend Jobs: Toggling mounted ON increases job total_fee by $50
Frontend Jobs: Mounted state correctly displayed after save (Yes/No)
Frontend Stones: Stone detail dialog shows 'Mounted (Jewellery)' toggle in edit mode
Frontend Stones: Mounted state correctly displayed (Yes/No)

bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'mounted: Optional[bool] = None' to StoneResponse class
bugs_fixed.impact: Frontend was not receiving mounted state from API, causing UI to always show 'No'

critical_code_review_comments: Backend mounted fee logic correctly handles certificate_group - only charges once per group
Frontend correctly refreshes job data after saving to update total_fee display
data-testid attributes present for mounted switch and save button
seed_data_creation: Used existing Job #18 with 3 stones in certificate group 1
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mounted fee feature fully tested and working. Bug fixed: StoneResponse model was missing 'mounted' field. Job #18 has stone RU300J1801 currently mounted (fee $730). The mounted fee is $50 and is only charged once per certificate group.
